summary: Homepage redesign testing complete for iteration 39. All NEW changes verified: 1) Reviews grid now 2-column (was 3-col), 10 cards display correctly in pairs. 2) Pricing section redesigned with dark #1A2F45 background, PRICING eyebrow, 'No Surprises. Ever.' title, 3 cards with dark theme - middle card ($60 Diagnostic) has amber border + 'MOST ASKED' badge, italic note below. 3) FAQ section redesigned with cream #F8F5F0 background, FAQ eyebrow, 'Quick Answers' title, clean open layout with +/x amber toggles and 2px amber left border on open answers.
critical_code_review_comments: All design specs implemented correctly per requirements
Reviews grid uses repeat(2, 1fr) for 2-column layout
Featured pricing card has 1.5px amber border (browser may render as 1px)
FAQ clean layout with border-bottom only, no box/bg on items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage fully redesigned. Reviews at #reviews has 2-column grid with 10 cards. Pricing at #pricing has dark #1A2F45 bg with 3 cards (middle featured). FAQ at #faq has cream #F8F5F0 bg with clean accordion. All sections lazy-loaded - scroll slowly to trigger. Base URL: https://fixitbay-seo-1.preview.emergentagent.com
